item.title: 星舰 V3 首飞成功，22 颗模拟卫星成功释放，IPO 前关键验证完成
item.guid: 星舰-V3-首飞成功，22-颗模拟卫星成功释放，IPO-前关键验证完成
item.description:
Early this morning, SpaceX successfully launched its 12th Starship test flight from Starbase in Texas, USA, completing the maiden flight of the brand new Starship V3. The rocket's launch was aborted the day before due to a hydraulic pin malfunction. 今天凌晨，SpaceX 从美国德克萨斯州星舰基地成功发射第 12 次星舰测试飞行，完成了全新星舰 (Starship) V3 的首飞。火箭此前一天曾因液压销钉故障中止发射。

The Starship V3 launched this time consists of the upper stage Ship 39 and the Super Heavy booster Booster 19, with an overall height exceeding 40 stories, making it the largest and most powerful rocket ever flown . 此次发射的 Starship V3 由上级飞船 Ship 39 与 Super Heavy 助推器 Booster 19 组成，整体高度超过 40 层楼， 是迄今为止飞行过的最大、最强火箭 。

The V3 version features multiple upgrades, including redesigned Raptor 3 engines (greater thrust, lower weight), larger capacity fuel tanks, and propulsion system improvements for future in-orbit refueling and rendezvous and docking. V3 版本搭载了多项升级，包括重新设计的 Raptor 3 发动机（更大推力、更低重量）、更大容量燃料箱，以及用于未来在轨加注和交会对接的推进系统改进。

After liftoff, the first stage booster failed to complete its return ignition after stage separation and subsequently fell uncontrolled into the Gulf of Mexico. The upper stage spacecraft experienced an engine shutdown during ascent but successfully entered its intended orbit by extending the burn of its remaining five engines. 升空后，助推器一级在完成级间分离后未能完成返回点火，随即失控坠入墨西哥湾。飞船上级在上升过程中出现一台发动机停机，但凭借剩余五台发动机延长燃烧成功进入预定轨道。

The spacecraft then successfully opened its payload bay, releasing all 22 simulated Starlink satellites, with a deployment speed significantly faster than previous versions. Two of these improved simulated satellites, dubbed 'Dodger Dogs,' carried cameras to photograph the heat shield from outside the spacecraft, providing data for future improvements. 飞船随后顺利开启载荷舱，将 22 颗模拟星链卫星全部释放，部署速度明显快于此前版本。其中两颗被称为「Dodger Dogs」的改进型模拟卫星携带摄像头，在飞船外对其隔热板进行拍摄，为后续改进提供数据。

Additionally, SpaceX decided to abandon the planned in-orbit restart experiment for the Raptor engine. As of publication, the spacecraft is completing its atmospheric re-entry phase, having passed through the highest heat flux region, and is expected to splash down in the Indian Ocean. 此外，SpaceX 决定放弃原计划的 Raptor 发动机在轨重启实验。截至发稿，飞船正在完成再入大气层阶段，通过了最高热流区，预计将在印度洋溅落。

item.title: 微信解释消息撤回为何限制为 2 分钟
item.guid: 微信解释消息撤回为何限制为-2-分钟
item.description:
WeChat Pay yesterday explained the design basis for WeChat's ordinary message 'recallable within 2 minutes.' The WeChat team stated that within 2 minutes, the recipient has likely not finished reading, and recalling is closer to 'rephrasing'; after 2 minutes, the recipient has usually read or even replied, and recalling at this point would disrupt the continuity of the chat history. 微信派昨日解释了微信普通消息「2 分钟内可撤回」的设计依据。微信团队称，2 分钟内对方大概率还没读完，撤回更接近于「重新说」；超过 2 分钟后，对方通常已经阅读甚至回复，此时撤回会破坏聊天记录的连续性。

The WeChat team also explained two accompanying design features: 微信团队还解释了两个配套设计：

    Firstly, file-type messages allow for a longer recall period because there is a natural 'time lag' for recipients to view files, as they might be in a meeting or commuting;

    Secondly, the person whose message is recalled will still see a notification because communication tools need to ensure delivery accuracy. If messages disappear without a trace, 'what was sent' and 'whether it was received' would become unverifiable questions.

item.title: DeepSeek 700 亿融资曝光
item.guid: DeepSeek-700-亿融资曝光
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, DeepSeek is in talks for a funding round of approximately $10 billion (70 billion RMB), with a valuation reaching around $45 billion. 据彭博社报道，DeepSeek 正在进行一轮约 100 亿美元（700 亿元人民币）的融资谈判，估值达到约 450 亿美元。

Two weeks ago, this funding, as reported by foreign media, was valued at 50 billion RMB (approximately $7.35 billion). Insiders revealed that DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng plans to personally invest, with an amount potentially as high as 20 billion RMB, accounting for 40% of the total funding round. 两周前，外媒曝光的这个融资在数字还是500 亿元人民币（约合 73.5 亿美元）。知情人士透露，DeepSeek 创始人梁文锋计划亲自出资，金额可能高达 200 亿元，占整轮融资总额的 40%。

If the deal goes through, this would be the largest single round of financing ever for a Chinese AI startup. 若交易达成，这将是中国 AI 初创公司有史以来规模最大的单轮融资。

Sources say DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng has made it clear to potential investors that the company will continue to prioritize groundbreaking AI research and pursue Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), rather than short-term commercialization. At the same time, DeepSeek has also pledged to stick to an open-source approach. 知情人士称，DeepSeek 创始人梁文峰已向潜在投资者明确表示，公司将继续优先推进突破性人工智能研究，追求通用人工智能（AGI），而非短期商业化变现。同时，DeepSeek 也承诺坚持开源路线。

Current potential investors include the National Artificial Intelligence Industry Investment Fund, Tencent, IDG Capital, and Lisi Capital. However, Bloomberg emphasized that negotiations are still ongoing, and the final investment amount and participants may still be adjusted. 目前潜在投资方包括国家人工智能产业投资基金、腾讯、IDG 资本，以及砺思资本。不过彭博社强调，谈判仍在进行中，最终投资金额和参与方仍可能调整。

item.title: 国产手机 618 前集体降价，部分旗舰降幅超过 20%
item.guid: 国产手机-618-前集体降价，部分旗舰降幅超过-20%
item.description:
According to 21st Century Business Herald, recently, domestic mobile phone brands such as Huawei, Xiaomi, Honor, and OPPO have collectively reduced prices on e-commerce platforms, with some models seeing price drops exceeding 20% after subsidies. Key changes include: 据 21 世纪经济报道，近日，华为、小米、荣耀、OPPO 等国产手机品牌在电商平台集中降价，部分机型叠加补贴后的降幅超过 20%。主要变化包括：

    Multiple Huawei phones can receive coupons up to 2000 RMB on JD.com, and Xiaomi 17 Max offers trade-in discounts up to 1200 RMB;

    REDMI K90 Pro Max has a price reduction of 520 RMB, and some Honor models have a maximum reduction of 1300 RMB;

    OPPO Find X9 Pro offers a maximum discount exceeding 800 RMB;

    The Dewu platform shows that the REDMI K90 Pro Max 12GB + 256GB version dropped from its launch price of 3999 RMB to 3198 RMB, and the Xiaomi 17 12GB + 256GB version dropped from 4499 RMB to 3621 RMB.

Previously, Apple had already cut prices by 1000 yuan for models like the iPhone 17 Pro; Huawei Mate X7 saw a maximum price drop of 1000 yuan, and Mate X6 a maximum drop of 3000 yuan. Lei Jun also stated at the recent Xiaomi 17 Max launch event that memory prices might continue to rise for a longer period, and advised users with purchasing needs to buy as early as possible. 此前，苹果已对 iPhone 17 Pro 等机型降价 1000 元；华为 Mate X7 最高降 1000 元，Mate X6 最高降 3000 元。雷军也在不久前的小米 17 Max 发布会上表示，内存价格上涨可能持续较长时间，并建议有购机需求的用户尽早购买。

item.title: DeepSeek-V4-Pro API 6 月起永久降价至原定价四分之一
item.guid: DeepSeek-V4-Pro-API-6-月起永久降价至原定价四分之一
item.description:
DeepSeek officially announced that the current 2.5-fold limited-time discount for the DeepSeek-V4-Pro model API will transition to a permanent price reduction after 23:59 on May 31st. Starting June 1st, the model API will be adjusted to one-quarter of its original price. DeepSeek 官方宣布，DeepSeek-V4-Pro 模型 API 现行 2.5 折限时优惠将在 5 月 31 日 23:59 结束后转为 永久降价 。6 月 1 日起，该模型 API 调整为原定价的四分之一。

DeepSeek API documentation shows that V4-Pro currently supports 1M context, with an input cache miss price of $0.435 per million tokens and an output price of $0.87 per million tokens; the documentation previously indicated that the discount period was extended until 23:59 Beijing time on May 31st. DeepSeek API 文档显示，V4-Pro 目前支持 1M 上下文，输入缓存未命中价格为每百万 tokens 0.435 美元，输出价格为每百万 tokens 0.87 美元；文档此前标注优惠期延长至北京时间 5 月 31 日 23:59。

This adjustment transforms the promotional price into a long-term price. Developers integrating toolchains, application backends, or internal enterprise services after June will calculate costs according to the new API billing standards. 本次调整把活动价格变成长期价格，开发者在 6 月后接入工具链、应用后端或企业内部服务时，将按新的 API 计费口径核算成本。

item.title: OpenAI 一季度营收领先 Anthropic 约 10 亿美元，但后者正在赶上
item.guid: OpenAI-一季度营收领先-Anthropic-约-10-亿美元，但后者正在赶上
item.description:
According to The Information, OpenAI's revenue in the first quarter of this year was $5.7 billion, about $1 billion higher than Anthropic's. 据 The Information 报道，OpenAI 今年一季度营收为 57 亿美元，比 Anthropic 高约 10 亿美元。

Meanwhile, OpenAI achieved approximately $5.7 billion in revenue in the first quarter of this year, about $1 billion more than Anthropic; however, looking at recent annualized revenue, Anthropic has approached $45 billion, higher than OpenAI's annualized level of approximately $30 billion. 同时，OpenAI 今年第一季度实现约 57 亿美元营收，较 Anthropic 多出约 10 亿美元；但从近期年化收入看，Anthropic 已接近 450 亿美元，高于 OpenAI 约 300 亿美元的年化水平。

These figures further shift the competition between the two companies from model capabilities and user growth to commercialization efficiency. OpenAI maintained its lead in single-quarter revenue in Q1, but Anthropic's Q2 forecast and annualized revenue scale indicate that Claude's growth in the enterprise and developer paid markets is accelerating. 这组数字把两家公司的竞争从模型能力和用户增长，进一步拉到商业化效率上。OpenAI 仍在一季度保持单季营收领先，但 Anthropic 的二季度预测和年化收入规模显示，Claude 在企业和开发者付费市场的增长速度正在加快。

item.title: 知情人士回应腾讯文档拟撤销北京团队传言
item.guid: 知情人士回应腾讯文档拟撤销北京团队传言
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, an insider close to Tencent responded to rumors that 'Tencent Docs plans to withdraw its Beijing team,' stating that the Tencent Docs team recently made adjustments to some regional workplace teams, with Shenzhen as the core office location. The purpose is to further focus on the AI business strategy and improve the collaboration efficiency of the AI product team. 据界面新闻报道，接近腾讯的知情人士回应「腾讯文档拟撤销北京团队」传闻称，腾讯文档团队近期以深圳为核心办公地，对部分区域职场团队进行调整，目的是进一步聚焦 AI 业务战略、提升 AI 产品团队协同效率。

The person stated that in the past, a small portion of the Tencent Docs team was based in Beijing, with most of the team in Shenzhen; the company has communicated with employees affected by the adjustment and has opened internal transfer opportunities in Shenzhen, Beijing, and other locations, while also soliciting and respecting employees' personal wishes. 该人士称，腾讯文档过去有少部分团队设在北京，大部分团队在深圳；公司已与受调整影响的员工沟通，并开放深圳、北京等地内部活水转岗机会，也会征求并尊重员工个人意愿。

item.title: 持有医疗器械证也没用，智能手表将被排除医保报销
item.guid: 持有医疗器械证也没用，智能手表将被排除医保报销
item.description:
According to Yicai, the National Healthcare Security Administration and the Ministry of Finance recently jointly issued a notice establishing a whitelist system for personal account payments at designated retail pharmacies to define the boundaries of medical insurance payments. It clarifies that non-medical items such as smart communication timing devices, massage equipment, health products, and medical devices and consumables with low medical added value must not be included in the whitelist. 据第一财经报道，国家医保局、财政部近日联合发布通知，通过建立定点零售药店个人账户支付白名单制度划定医保支付边界，明确智能通讯计时设备、按摩设备、保健品等非医疗用品及医疗附加值较低的器械耗材不得纳入白名单。

The report points out that smartwatches like the Huawei WATCH D2, which hold medical device registration approvals, could previously be paid for with medical insurance personal accounts in some pharmacies. This policy explicitly excludes them. 报道指出，华为 WATCH D2 等持有医疗器械注册批文的智能手表，此前在部分药店可使用医保个账支付，此次政策将其明确排除在外。

Provincial medical insurance departments must, in principle, issue a unified provincial payment whitelist by the end of September this year, at which point the aforementioned wearable devices will officially exit the medical insurance payment channel. Yesterday, reporters called several pharmacies, and the policy is still in a transitional period, with varying responses from each store. 各省级医保部门原则上须于今年 9 月底前出台全省统一的支付白名单，届时上述可穿戴设备将正式告别医保支付通道。昨日记者致电多家药店，政策仍处于落地过渡期，各店答复不一。

item.title: 三星内存芯片员工达成临时奖金协议，平均奖金可达 34 万美元
item.guid: 三星内存芯片员工达成临时奖金协议，平均奖金可达-34-万美元
item.description:
According to The Verge, Samsung Electronics' semiconductor division and its union have reached a provisional agreement on a bonus plan, under which some memory chip employees could receive an average of about $340,000 in bonuses this year. This agreement will now be put to a member vote for approval. 据 The Verge 报道，三星电子半导体部门与工会就奖金方案达成临时协议，部分内存芯片员工今年可能获得平均约 34 万美元奖金。这一协议接下来将交由成员投票批准。

The negotiations previously revolved around the bonus cap for Samsung's semiconductor business, with the union having threatened an 18-day strike. The Verge noted that the significant increase in bonus amounts comes against a backdrop of improved profits in the memory chip business, with demand for high-bandwidth memory and advanced storage for AI servers boosting the division's performance. 这场谈判此前围绕三星半导体业务奖金上限展开，工会曾威胁发起为期 18 天的罢工。The Verge 提到，奖金金额大幅上升的背景是存储芯片业务利润改善，AI 服务器对高带宽内存和先进存储的需求推高了部门业绩。

This is also a follow-up to Samsung's recent labor risks. Previously, market attention focused on whether a breakdown in negotiations would affect chip supply; the provisional agreement at least moves the conflict to the member voting stage. For Samsung, the profit growth brought by the AI storage cycle is translating into higher demands from employees for performance distribution. 这也是三星近期劳资风险的后续进展。此前市场关注点在于谈判破裂是否影响芯片供应；临时协议至少把冲突推进到成员表决阶段。对于三星而言，AI 存储周期带来的利润增长正在转化为员工对绩效分配的更高要求。

item.title: 微软消费营销负责人 Yusuf Mehdi 将于明年离职
item.guid: 微软消费营销负责人-Yusuf-Mehdi-将于明年离职
item.description:
According to The Verge, Yusuf Mehdi, Microsoft's Executive Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer for Consumers, announced he will leave Microsoft next year, ending a 35-year tenure. Before his departure, he will remain responsible for marketing Windows, consumer-facing Copilot, and Microsoft 365 consumer businesses. 据 The Verge 报道，微软执行副总裁、消费者首席营销官 Yusuf Mehdi 宣布将于明年离开微软，结束 35 年任期。在离职前，他仍将负责 Windows、面向消费者的 Copilot 和 Microsoft 365 消费业务营销。

Mehdi was a core marketing executive for multiple consumer product milestones at Microsoft over the past few decades, participating in the market narratives for businesses such as Windows, Surface, Bing, Xbox, and Copilot. The report mentioned that in an internal memo, he stated he would continue to advance current work and assist with the handover before leaving. Mehdi 是微软过去数十年多个消费者产品节点的核心营销高管，参与过 Windows、Surface、Bing、Xbox 和 Copilot 等业务的市场叙事。报道提到，他在内部备忘录中称，离职前会继续推进当前工作，并协助交接。

item.title: 腾讯音乐完成收购喜马拉雅，按监管要求解除独家授权
item.guid: 腾讯音乐完成收购喜马拉雅，按监管要求解除独家授权
item.description:
According to Caixin, Tencent Music Entertainment Group has completed its acquisition of Ximalaya. After the transaction, Tencent Music will lift exclusive audio content authorizations as required by regulators and continue to advance the integration of its long-form audio business. 据财新报道，腾讯音乐娱乐集团已完成对喜马拉雅的收购。交易完成后，腾讯音乐将按监管要求解除音频内容独家授权，并继续推进长音频业务整合。

Ximalaya is one of the main online audio platforms in China, with content covering audiobooks, knowledge payment, podcasts, and general entertainment audio. Tencent Music's original businesses include music streaming, online karaoke, and social entertainment services. After the merger of the two companies, Tencent Music's coverage in long-form audio content and user scenarios will further expand. 喜马拉雅是国内主要在线音频平台之一，内容覆盖有声书、知识付费、播客和泛娱乐音频。腾讯音乐原有业务则包括音乐流媒体、在线 K 歌和社交娱乐服务。两家公司合并后，腾讯音乐在长音频内容和用户场景上的覆盖会进一步扩大。

The regulatory requirement to lift exclusive authorizations is a key limiting condition after the completion of this transaction. Tencent Music can integrate Ximalaya's content and commercialization capabilities, but it cannot continue to lock in audio copyright supply through exclusive authorizations. 监管要求解除独家授权，是这笔交易完成后的关键限制条件。腾讯音乐可以整合喜马拉雅的内容和商业化能力，但不能通过独家授权继续锁定音频版权供给。

item.title: 💡 OpenAI「危机大师」：AI 叙事不应只剩乌托邦和末日论
item.guid: 💡-OpenAI「危机大师」：AI-叙事不应只剩乌托邦和末日论
item.description:
According to Wired, Chris Lehane, OpenAI's head of global affairs, was interviewed yesterday and responded to the company's public relations crisis and regulatory strategies. 据《连线》报道，OpenAI 全球事务负责人 Chris Lehane 昨日接受采访，就公司面临的公关危机与监管策略作出回应。

Currently, the public image of the AI industry continues to deteriorate—graduation ceremony speakers have been booed for mentioning AI, and last month someone even threw a Molotov cocktail at Sam Altman's San Francisco home. Lehane believes the root of the problem lies in the polarization of public discourse: 当前，AI 行业的公众形象持续恶化——毕业典礼演讲者因谈及 AI 遭到嘘声，上月更有人向 Sam Altman 旧金山住所投掷燃烧瓶。Lehane 认为，问题根源在于公共叙事的极端化：

Public discourse is often artificially created as an either/or situation—either everyone doesn't have to work and spends all day painting watercolors in a beachfront villa, or a small elite controls everything.

He stated that OpenAI needs to convey more "calibrated" messages and propose substantive solutions for issues such as employment impact and protection of minors, including a four-day work week, expanded healthcare coverage, and taxation of AI labor. 他表示，OpenAI 需要传递更「校准」的信息，并就就业冲击、未成年人保护等问题提出实质方案，包括四天工作制、扩大医疗保障及对 AI 劳动力征税等。

item.title: Codex 支持 Mac 锁屏后继续远程工作
item.guid: Codex-支持-Mac-锁屏后继续远程工作
item.description:
Recently, OpenAI updated Codex capabilities: Codex now includes richer context, Goal mode, improved browser annotations, and a Computer Use feature that can continue running after the screen is locked. 日前，OpenAI 更新了 Codex 能力：Codex 增加更丰富的上下文、Goal mode、浏览器标注改进，以及可在锁屏后继续运行的 Computer Use 功能。

"Locked computer use" allows Codex to continue working remotely and securely after a Mac is locked. 「locked computer use」允许 Codex 在 Mac 锁定后继续远程、安全地工作。

This capability, along with Goal mode in Codex desktop, IDE extensions, and CLI, continues to push Codex from a single-execution tool towards longer task hosting scenarios, allowing tasks to continue executing even after a Mac is locked. 这项能力与 Codex 桌面端、IDE 扩展和 CLI 中的 Goal mode 一起，继续把 Codex 从单次执行工具推向更长任务托管场景，Mac 锁定后仍能继续执行任务。

item.title: 字节跳动开源统一多模态模型 Lance
item.guid: 字节跳动开源统一多模态模型-Lance
item.description:
ByteDance's intelligent creation team has released and open-sourced Lance, a native unified multimodal model with 3B active parameters, covering image and video understanding, generation, and editing tasks. 字节跳动智能创作团队发布并开源原生统一多模态模型 Lance，3B 激活参数，覆盖图像、视频的理解、生成和编辑任务。

  • Architecture: Text tokens come from the Qwen2.5-VL embedding layer; vision input for understanding is extracted as semantic visual tokens by Qwen2.5-VL ViT; vision input for generation is encoded by Wan2.2's 3D Causal VAE; 架构：文本标记来自 Qwen2.5-VL 嵌入层，偏理解的视觉输入由 Qwen2.5-VL ViT 提取语义视觉标记，偏生成的视觉输入由 Wan2.2 的 3D 因果 VAE 编码；
  • Training: Pre-training uses approximately 1 billion image-text pairs and 140 million video-text pairs, totaling 1.5T tokens, followed by continuous training, supervised fine-tuning, and reinforcement learning stages; 训练：预训练使用约 10 亿图文对、1.4 亿视频文本对，总计 1.5T 标记，随后进入持续训练、监督微调和强化学习阶段；
  • Evaluation: GenEval scored 0.90, VBench total score 85.11, GEdit-Bench scored 7.30, and MVBench reached 62.0. 评测：GenEval 得分 0.90，VBench 总分 85.11，GEdit-Bench 得分 7.30，MVBench 达 62.0。

item.title: 智能戒指公司 Oura 已秘密提交美国 IPO 申请，去年营收超过 5 亿美元
item.guid: 智能戒指公司-Oura-已秘密提交美国-IPO-申请，去年营收超过-5-亿美元
item.description:
According to GeekPark, citing The Wall Street Journal, smart ring manufacturer Oura has confidentially filed for an initial public offering with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Oura was founded in Finland in 2013 and is currently headquartered in San Francisco, with its core product being the Oura Ring smart ring. 据智东西援引《华尔街日报》报道，智能戒指制造商 Oura 已向美国证券交易委员会秘密提交首次公开募股申请。Oura 2013 年创立于芬兰，目前总部位于旧金山，核心产品为 Oura Ring 智能戒指。

In recent years, Oura has expanded its smart ring capabilities from sleep tracking to stress, women's health, automatic activity detection, and metabolic health. The Oura Ring 4, released in October 2024, uses Smart Sensing technology and features upgraded daytime stress, automatic activity detection, cycle insights, and app experience; Dexcom, a blood glucose monitoring device company, also announced a partnership with Oura in 2024 and stated it would invest $75 million. Oura 近几年把智能戒指从睡眠追踪扩展到压力、女性健康、自动活动检测和代谢健康。2024 年 10 月发布的 Oura Ring 4 使用 Smart Sensing 传感技术，并升级日间压力、自动活动检测、周期洞察和 App 体验；血糖监测设备公司 Dexcom 也在 2024 年宣布与 Oura 合作，并称将投资 7500 万美元。

item.title: 千问接入 Qwen3.7-Max，App、PC 和网页端同步开放
item.guid: 千问接入-Qwen3.7-Max，App、PC-和网页端同步开放
item.description:
Qianwen announced yesterday that its new generation flagship model, Qwen3.7-Max, has been integrated into the Qianwen App, PC, and web versions. Users can switch to using "Qwen3.7-Max" by clicking the capsule entry after updating the Qianwen App to version 6.9.7 or higher. 千问昨天宣布，新一代千问旗舰模型 Qwen3.7-Max 已接入千问 App、PC 端和网页端。用户将千问 App 更新至 6.9.7 及以上版本后，可点击「Qwen3.7-Max」胶囊入口切换使用。

Officially, Qwen3.7-Max scored 56.6 in Artificial Analysis's latest global large model ranking, placing fifth globally and first among domestic models. The evaluations listed by Qianwen cover areas such as programming agents, general agents, reasoning ability, instruction following, and multilingual capabilities. 官方称，Qwen3.7-Max 在 Artificial Analysis 最新全球大模型榜单中得分 56.6，位列全球第五、国产第一。千问列出的评测覆盖编程智能体、通用智能体、推理能力、指令遵循和多语言能力等方向。

Officially, Qwen3.7-Max surpassed Claude Opus 4.6 and all domestic models in evaluations such as GPQA Diamond, HLE, HMMT 2026 Feb, and IMOAnswerBench; its IFBench instruction following score was 79.1. 官方称，Qwen3.7-Max 在 GPQA Diamond、HLE、HMMT 2026 Feb 和 IMOAnswerBench 等评测中超过 Claude Opus 4.6 及所有国产模型；IFBench 指令遵循得分为 79.1。

item.title: WordPress 7.0 发布，加入 AI 建站与 420 多项修复
item.guid: WordPress-7.0-发布，加入-AI-建站与-420-多项修复
item.description:
According to Make WordPress Core's 7.0 Field Guide and Pantheon release notes, WordPress 7.0 has been officially released. This update includes over 400 enhancements and fixes, with AI connectivity being one of the new version's key focuses. 据 Make WordPress Core 的 7.0 Field Guide 和 Pantheon 发布说明，WordPress 7.0 正式发布，本次更新包含 400 多项增强与修复，并把 AI 连接能力作为新版本的重点之一。

WordPress 7.0's AI features primarily revolve around site building and content editing, lowering the barrier to entry for users without extensive development experience. The new version also improves the editor, block experience, theme development, and performance, and fixes several historical issues. WordPress 7.0 的 AI 功能主要围绕站点搭建和内容编辑展开，面向没有完整开发经验的用户降低建站门槛。新版本同时改进了编辑器、区块体验、主题开发和性能表现，并修复了多个历史问题。

item.title: Kimi Batch API 以 6 折价格处理大规模任务
item.guid: Kimi-Batch-API-以-6-折价格处理大规模任务
item.description:
Kimi Open Platform has launched the Kimi Batch API, designed for large-scale, non-real-time batch tasks, supporting image and video processing, and capable of calling models such as K2.6 and K2.5. Kimi 开放平台推出 Kimi Batch API，面向大规模、非实时批量任务，支持图片和视频处理，并可调用 K2.6、K2.5 等模型。

  • Batch tasks are billed at 60% of the real-time API price; 批量任务按实时 API 价格的 6 折计费；

    • Does not occupy real-time concurrent quota, the platform calls it "unlimited concurrency";

    Supports tasks such as model evaluation, content classification, batch generation, information extraction, data annotation, data cleaning, and image classification;

    Users can submit batch processing files and download results after the task is completed.

item.title: 星巴克停用北美门店 AI 库存系统
item.guid: 星巴克停用北美门店-AI-库存系统
item.description:
According to Reuters, Starbucks this week terminated the AI inventory counting system Automated Counting used in its North American stores. The system had been online for about 9 months and was used to automatically count some beverage ingredients and milk inventory in stores. 据路透社报道，星巴克本周终止了北美门店使用的 AI 库存盘点系统 Automated Counting。该系统上线约 9 个月，用于自动统计门店部分饮品原料和牛奶库存。

Internal communications reviewed by Reuters show that Starbucks required stores to stop using Automated Counting starting this week, returning to manual inventory counting for beverage ingredients and milk, similar to other inventory categories. The report stated that the tool used tablet cameras and LiDAR to scan shelves, but in practice, it often misidentified similar dairy products or missed some items. 路透社查看的内部通讯显示，星巴克要求门店从本周起停止使用 Automated Counting，饮品配料和牛奶回到与其他库存类别相同的人工盘点方式。报道称，该工具曾利用平板电脑的摄像头和 LiDAR 扫描货架，但在实际使用中经常把相近奶类识别错误，或漏掉部分商品。

Starbucks told Reuters that the project was discontinued to unify store inventory counting methods and to continue promoting more frequent daily replenishment and supply chain improvements. The system was originally part of CEO Brian Niccol's efforts to fix store stockout issues and had been listed as a store technology transformation case. 星巴克对路透社表示，停用该项目是为了统一门店库存盘点方式，并继续推进更高频次的日常补货和供应链改善。该系统原本属于 CEO Brian Niccol 修复门店缺货问题的一部分，也曾被列入门店技术改造案例。

item.title: 广东发布价格诚信指引，茶位费和纸巾费需提前告知
item.guid: 广东发布价格诚信指引，茶位费和纸巾费需提前告知
item.description:
According to Guangzhou Release, the Guangdong Provincial Market Supervision Administration recently issued three price integrity compliance guidelines, covering the catering, retail, and accommodation industries. 据广州发布消息，广东省市场监督管理局近日发布三份价格诚信合规指引，覆盖餐饮、零售和住宿行业。

In catering scenarios, operators should inform consumers of the charging standards in advance before collecting fees such as tea service fees and tissue fees, and only charge after consumers accept them; member prices and non-member prices should be marked with the same font size, font, color, and position. Display areas such as menus, dishes, and seafood tanks should also clearly mark prices, avoiding only marking some dishes or temporary price increases. 餐饮场景中，经营者收取茶位费、纸巾费等费用前，应提前告知消费者收费标准，并在消费者接受后再收费；会员价和非会员价应使用相同字号、字体、颜色和位置标示。菜单、菜品和海鲜池等展示区域也应明码标价，避免只标示部分菜品或临时加价。

In retail and accommodation scenarios, the guidelines require merchants to clearly display product or service prices, and not to use false discounts, vague pricing, or misleading price information. Platform enterprises must not force merchants to sell goods below cost, nor disrupt normal price order through subsidies, price limits, or other means. 零售和住宿场景中，指引要求商家清晰展示商品或服务价格，不得使用虚假折扣、模糊标价或误导性价格信息。平台企业不得强制商家以低于成本的价格销售商品，也不得通过补贴、限价等方式扰乱正常价格秩序。

item.title: 1688 商家遭遇 2.36 万元「仅退款」，跨省维权后追回货款
item.guid: 1688-商家遭遇-2.36-万元「仅退款」，跨省维权后追回货款
item.description:
According to Red Star News, Ms. Yang, a merchant from Handan, Hebei, sold a batch of photovoltaic components worth 23,600 yuan on the 1688 platform. After the goods were signed for, the buyer applied for a "refund only" on the grounds of "not receiving the goods." As the merchant did not check the backend application in time, the system automatically refunded the full payment to the buyer's account. 据红星新闻报道，河北邯郸商家杨女士在 1688 平台售出一批价值 2.36 万元的光伏制件，货物签收后，买家以「未收到货」为由申请「仅退款」。由于商家未及时查看后台申请，系统按超时规则自动退款，货款全额退回买家账户。

Ms. Yang then contacted the actual recipient and found that the buyer who placed the order was an intermediary for a Shanghai company, and the goods had been resold to a downstream third party and installed for use, making returns impossible. After the platform assisted in debt collection for 20 days, the buyer remained uncontactable. On May 17, Ms. Yang and her companion traveled from Hebei by train for over 18 hours to Shanghai to report the case to the police and protect their rights. 杨女士随后联系实际收货方发现，下单买家是上海一家公司的中间商，货物已被转卖给下游第三方并安装使用，无法退货。平台协助催款 20 天后买家仍失联，杨女士与同伴于 5 月 17 日从河北乘坐 18 个多小时火车赴上海报警维权。

After police verification, the buyer returned the 23,600 yuan payment on May 21. Ms. Yang stated that the profit from this order was only five or six hundred yuan, while the costs of protecting her rights, such as transportation and accommodation, had already exceeded one thousand yuan, and she would consider legal action later. 警方核实后，买家已于 5 月 21 日将 2.36 万元货款原路退回。杨女士表示，这笔订单利润仅五六百元，交通、住宿等维权成本已上千元，后续会考虑起诉。

The report also mentioned that the "Measures for the Supervision and Administration of Online Trading Platform Rules" came into effect on February 1 this year, explicitly prohibiting platforms from using rules to force or implicitly force platform operators to bear after-sales responsibilities such as refunds without returns, and requiring platforms to establish fair dispute resolution mechanisms. 报道也提到，《网络交易平台规则监督管理办法》已于今年 2 月 1 日起施行，明确禁止平台利用规则强制或变相强制平台内经营者承担退款不退货等售后责任，并要求平台建立公平的交易纠纷解决机制。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜AI 鸟食盆把后院变成观鸟直播间
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜AI-鸟食盆把后院变成观鸟直播间
item.description:
MacRumors experienced Birdfy's smart bird feeder and smart bird bath. They integrate cameras, solar power, Wi-Fi connectivity, and AI species recognition into backyard birdwatching devices, allowing users to view photos and videos of visiting birds in a mobile app. MacRumors 体验了 Birdfy 的智能鸟食盆与智能鸟浴盆。它们把摄像头、太阳能供电、Wi-Fi 连接和 AI 物种识别放进后院观鸟设备里，让用户在手机 App 中查看来访鸟类的照片和视频。

Traditional birdwatching requires people to stand by the window or go out with binoculars, while Birdfy turns random backyard visits into a private nature channel that can be reviewed: which birds have visited, how long they stayed, whether they bathed or pecked, all will be captured by the device and then turned into notifications, short videos, and identification records on the phone. 传统观鸟需要人守在窗边或带着望远镜出门，Birdfy 则把后院里的随机造访变成了一条可以回看的私人自然频道：哪只鸟来过、停留了多久、有没有洗澡或啄食，都会被设备拍下来，再变成手机里的提醒、短视频和识别记录。

Birdfy devices are equipped with 2K cameras, and the app pushes bird visit notifications and attempts to identify different bird species. Its experience is closer to a lightweight wild animal live stream: users don't have to be on-site to review the little episodes that happened in their backyard at the end of the day. Birdfy 设备搭载 2K 摄像头，应用会推送鸟类到访提醒，并尝试识别不同鸟种。它的体验更接近一种轻量版野生动物直播间：用户不必守在现场，也能在一天结束后翻看后院发生过的小插曲。

Regarding pricing, the standard Birdfy Feeder costs $170 and can be paired with a solar panel and lifetime AI recognition; the Birdfy Feeder 2 Duo costs $360, and the Birdfy Bath Pro costs $280, with the latter bringing similar capabilities to a bird bath scenario. 售价方面，标准款 Birdfy Feeder 售价 170 美元，可搭配太阳能板与终身 AI 识别；Birdfy Feeder 2 Duo 售价 360 美元，Birdfy Bath Pro 售价 280 美元，后者把同类能力放进鸟浴盆场景。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《世界的主人》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《世界的主人》
item.description:
"The World's Master" focuses on 17-year-old Lee Ju-in (played by Seo Soo-bin), who, by refusing to participate in a campus petition to boycott the release of a sexual assault offender, unexpectedly uncovers her hidden past of childhood abuse by relatives. 《世界的主人》聚焦 17 岁少女李珠仁（徐粹彬 饰），因拒绝参与一场抵制性侵罪犯出狱的校园联名请愿，意外揭开她童年遭亲属侵害的隐秘往事。

Facing public criticism, Ju-in refuses to be defined by the "victim" label, and under the multiple pressures of a broken family, campus turmoil, and inner shadows, she achieves self-reconciliation and life reconstruction. 面对舆论非议，珠仁拒绝被「受害者」标签定义，在破碎家庭、校园风波与内心阴影的多重压力下，完成自我和解与生命重建。

The film won Best Director and Best New Actress in the film category at the 62nd Baeksang Arts Awards, and received the "Roberto Rossellini Honorary Jury Award" at the 9th Pingyao International Film Festival, while also being nominated for the Platform Prize at the 50th Toronto International Film Festival. 影片荣获第 62 届百想艺术大赏电影部门最佳导演及最佳新人女演员奖，并在第 9 届平遥国际电影展摘得「罗伯托·罗西里尼荣誉·评审荣誉」，同时入围第 50 届多伦多国际电影节站台奖。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《托斯卡纳书店时光》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《托斯卡纳书店时光》
item.description:
Italian poet Alba Donati returns to Lucignano in the Tuscan mountains in "Tuscan Bookstore Time," documenting how she opened a bookstore called "Pen Nib" through crowdfunding in a mountain village with only 180 permanent residents. 意大利诗人阿尔巴 · 多纳蒂在《托斯卡纳书店时光》中回到托斯卡纳山区卢奇尼亚纳，记录自己如何在一座常住居民只有 180 人的山村里，以众筹方式开设一家名叫「笔尖」的书店。

Donati writes about the bookstore within the context of mountain village life: readers, neighbors, a shelf for female writers, and visitors from afar all make this small shop more than just "a place to sell books," transforming it into a slow-paced public space. 多纳蒂把书店放在山村生活里写：读者、邻居、女性作家书架、远道而来的访客，都让这间小店不局限于「卖书的地方」，成为一种慢下来的公共空间。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《极限竞速：地平线 6》把开放世界赛车带到日本
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《极限竞速：地平线-6》把开放世界赛车带到日本
item.description:
PC Gamer reviewed "Forza Horizon 6," developed by Playground Games and published by Xbox Game Studios, stating: It's not a particularly radical sequel, but the brand-new Japanese map still provides players with an excellent driving experience. PC Gamer 评测了 Playground Games 开发、Xbox Game Studios 发行的《极限竞速：地平线 6》，评价是：它并不是一部特别激进的续作，但全新的日本地图依然给玩家带来良好的驾驶体验。

This installment continues to revolve around the series' familiar racing carnival: players participate in various events, collect vehicles, customize garages in an open-world map, and switch driving rhythms between highways, city streets, and mountain roads. 本作继续围绕系列熟悉的赛车嘉年华展开：玩家在开放世界地图里参加不同赛事、收集车辆、改装车库，并在公路、城市街道和山路之间切换驾驶节奏。

PC Gamer believes that "Forza Horizon 6" continues the series' structure of over a decade: the map is still filled with event icons, vehicles, and open-world activities, and the Japanese map adds stronger recognition to this familiar framework: city neon, mountain road curves, small car culture, and high-speed cruising are all placed within the same driving playground. PC Gamer 认为，《极限竞速：地平线 6》延续了系列十多年来的结构：地图上仍然会铺满赛事图标、车辆和开放世界活动，日本地图给这套熟悉框架增加了更强的识别度：城市霓虹、山路弯道、小型车文化和高速巡航被放进同一个驾驶游乐场里。

"Forza Horizon 6" has been released, priced at 298 yuan on the Steam platform. If you already like the series, it's less like a complete overhaul upgrade and more like a long weekend trip, moving the familiar driving loop to a more visually immersive map. 《极限竞速：地平线 6》已发售，Steam 平台售价 298 元。如果你本来就喜欢这个系列，它不像一次推倒重来的升级，更像一次把熟悉驾驶循环搬到更有画面感地图里的周末长途。
